title: Original Color Catgirl Mod
description: This is a meme mod about a friend of mine.
body:
**Attention: This is not a fan-made mod of video game Blue Archive.**

This is a mod about a friend of mine called Original Color Catgirl and [here](https://www.mcmod.cn/author/27728.html) is her author page.  

She often calls herself "Original Color Catgirl", so I made this mod.  

The development of the mod has been approved by her.  

The cover of this mod is her profile picture.  

As it is a meme mod, you do not need to be too strict with those items in this mod.  

This mod added a creature, 3 items and a weapon.  

These things can make your survival more interesting.  

When you interact with her, she will tell you something in Chinese.  

The mod has stopped to update since August 17, 2022.
